reasoning: The control focuses on the disposal of confidential information, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that sensitive data such as secrets and etcd snapshots are rotated and retained according to policy. Audit logs should also have a retention policy to ensure they are disposed of after a certain period. Additionally, configuring pod termination grace periods can help ensure that data is properly flushed and disposed of during pod termination.
title: C1.2 The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity’s objectives related to confidentiality
